steps.title: Make two whale-length points
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the whale is 162 cm long, so use $(0,162)$. After 12 months, it has grown $12(4.8)=57.6$ cm, so its length is $162+57.6=219.6$ cm. Use $(12,219.6)$ and fit a line.

steps.title: Read the linear model
steps.content: The regression gives $m=4.8$ and $b=162$, so the equation is $$y=4.8x+162.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is the only equation with starting length 162 and monthly growth 4.8. Choice D is correct.
